query: Orders intermittently vanish between the queue and the database — get to the bottom of it.
Two patches in and the flaky login test still flakes; what now?
After the dependency upgrade everything compiles but the output is subtly different — investigate.
Staging works, prod doesn't, same artifact — diagnose before we touch any config.
We traced it to the off-by-one in pagination — just write the fix.
Profile the endpoint and shave the p99 latency.
